data.title: Black Diamond Reports First Quarter Results and Declares Dividend
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Black Diamond Group Limited unveiled its operational and financial performance for the first quarter of 2026, contrasting it with the same period in 2025. The company, traded as TSX: BDI, is a prominent supplier of space rentals and workforce lodging services. All monetary amounts discussed in the report are denominated in Canadian dollars.

data.description: HardScope has announced the launch of Market Bubble, a Prediction Market Podcast Series hosted by Banks and Ansem. The news was issued on 30-Apr-2026 via PR Newswire. The company has made changes to the release, providing additional details.

data.title: Epsium Enterprise Limited Appoints Mr. Ching Wan Wong as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Macau, Epsium Enterprise Limited (Nasdaq: EPSM) disclosed the selection of Mr. Wong Ching Wan as the new Chief Financial Officer, with his term beginning on May 1, 2026. Additionally, Mr. Ming Yin Gordon Au Yeung was also named as part of the announcement.

data.title: Ecopetrol Files Its Form 20-F for the Fiscal Year 2025 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Bogota, Colombia, Ecopetrol S.A. announced the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year that ended on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The company's stocks are listed as BVC: ECOPETROL and NYSE: EC. This filing fulfills Ecopetrol's reporting requirements to the SEC and ensures that information is widely available to the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), bondholders, and the broader market. The Form 20-F contains a comprehensive overview of the company's operations and the associated risk factors. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
Scott Peters has recently revealed his latest stock transactions.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to Aspire Mortgage Trust 2026-2 (SPIRE 2026-2)
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned initial ratings to eight classes of mortgage-backed notes from Aspire Mortgage Trust 2026-2 (SPIRE 2026-2). This transaction totals $450.6 million and involves 829 residential mortgages. The collateral consists of 99.3% fixed-rate mortgages (FRMs) and 0.7% hybrid adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs). These loans are categorized as Qualified Mortgages – Safe Harbor (APOR) accounting for the Quality Muffin Safe Harbor (A).

data.title: Sagen MI Canada Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Declares Preferred Share Dividend
data.description: Sagen MI Canada Inc. (TSX: MIC) announced a net income of $118 million for the first quarter of 2026, showing a $13 million decrease from the previous year. This decline was primarily attributed to reduced insurance service outcomes and increased insurance finance expenses, despite a rise in investment income. The Board of Directors also confirmed a dividend of $0.3375 per Class A preferred share, Series 1, scheduled for payment on June 30, 2026, to shareholders on record as of June 15, 2026. Sagen MI Canada Inc. stated that all dividends provided for Canadian federal, provincial, or territorial income tax purposes are classified as "eligible dividends."

data.title: Pan American Silver Announces Results of Annual General and Special Meeting
data.description: Pan American Silver Corp. announced the outcome of its annual general and special meeting of shareholders convened on April 30, 2026, in Vancouver, British Columbia. The event saw a detailed discussion on matters outlined in the Company's Management Information Circular from March 9, 2026, which can be accessed on Pan American's website. The company is listed on NYSE as PAAS and on TSX as PAAS. The voting results were shared following the Meeting.

data.description: In Montreal on April 30, 2026, Bombardier disclosed that all candidates listed in its management proxy circular from March 9, 2026, have been successfully voted in as directors of Bombardier Inc. at the annual general meeting of shareholders conducted earlier on the same day. data.title: InterCure Announces 2025 Results with NIS 270 Million in Revenue and Positive Operating Cash Flow
data.description: The Company achieved revenue exceeding NIS 270 million, with a net loss of NIS 37 million and an Adjusted EBITDA of NIS 47 million. Additionally, the positive operating cash flow reached NIS 17 million, indicating resilience and profitability. This marks the twelfth consecutive half-year of positive Adjusted EBITDA for the Company as it progresses in recovering from the effects of the events that occurred on October 7, 2023.

data.title: Belo Sun Provides Update on Volta Grande Gold Project
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Belo Sun Mining Corp. provided an update on its Volta Grande Gold Project in Brazil. The company announced the reissuance of the Installation License (LI) for the project. Belo Sun, trading as TSX: BSX and OTCQB: BSXGF, is pleased with this development in Pará State, Brazil.

data.title: Reddit Stock Jumps As Q1 Results Beat Expectations
data.description: Shares of Reddit surged on Thursday following the release of their first-quarter financial results, which exceeded the expectations of analysts. The stock saw a noticeable increase in value, with a significant rise in numbers. The positive performance was highlighted in various reports, with Investor's Business Daily also noting the jump in Reddit stock following the Q1 results.

data.title: Apple Stock Pops On Strong Q3 Guidance: Details
data.description: During Apple Inc.'s recent earnings call, shares of NASDAQ: AAPL surged by approximately 2%. This increase was in response to the company's robust June-quarter guidance, which surpassed expectations. Apple's management anticipates revenue growth of 14% to 17% for the upcoming quarter, exceeding the Street's prediction of around 9% growth. Additionally, Apple foresees a gross margin of 47.5% to 48.5%, higher than the consensus estimate of 47.6%. The optimistic forecast follows Apple's strong performance in the fiscal second quarter, with revenue reaching $111.18 billion, representing a 17% increase from the previous year and surpassing analyst projections of $109.66 billion. This positive outcome indicates Apple's enduring pricing power and cost discipline. For more details, refer to the complete story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Alliant Energy Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Alliant Energy Corporation reported unaudited earnings per share (EPS) of $0.87 for the first quarter of 2026, a slight increase from $0.83 in the first quarter of 2025 under U.S. generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP). The ongoing EPS for Q1 2026 was $0.82, down from $0.83 in the same period last year. The company has upheld its consolidated ongoing EPS forecast for 2026 in the range of $3.36 to $3.46. This marks over a decade of consistent performance for Alliant Energy.
